title: Women Corporate Directors Select Ventas, Dompé farmaceutici, CDW Corporation, and Natura & Co. as 2022 Visionary Award Honorees
text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Women Corporate Directors (WCD) select Ventas, Dompé farmaceutici, CDW Corporation, and Natura & Co. as the 2022 Visionary Award recipients at the 11th Annual Visionary Awards Celebration and Gala. The award ceremony, to be held at the JW Marriott Essex House Hotel in New York City on September 12 at 5:30 p.m. (ET), will recognize companies and individuals who exhibit an exceptional corporate commitment to diversity, inclusion and women's leadership in the boardro
